overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Red Dead Redemption 2 showing a character walking through the historic Saint Denis theatre district at night, entering a park gazebo where two men play cards, with atmospheric gas lamp lighting and wet cobblestone streets reflecting the warm lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: historic theatre district sidewalk under marquee

events.description: horse-drawn carriage passes along the cobblestone street to the right
slowing pace to observe the large vaudeville poster on the theatre wall

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the theatre sidewalk, passing under the illuminated marquee and examining the decorative posters

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage moving along the wet cobblestone street

entered.detail: ornate stone theatre building with tall columns and decorative molding
tall vertical illuminated sign with THEATRE lettering
large framed poster advertising Alessandro Caruso magic and vaudeville acts with decorative lighting
covered entrance with bright round electric bulbs and red carpet
cast iron gas lamp post with warm yellow glowing light

segments.scene_description: Walking along the wet cobblestone sidewalk beside the grand theatre building, passing under the illuminated marquee and large vaudeville posters. A horse-drawn carriage moves along the street as the character approaches the theatre entrance with its bright bulb lights.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban plaza transitioning to park area

events.description: exiting the covered theatre sidewalk into the open plaza area
turning toward the park gazebo visible ahead

agents.ego_description: leaving the theatre sidewalk and crossing the open cobblestone plaza toward the park gazebo in the distance

entered.detail: octagonal wooden gazebo with pointed roof and open railings in the park center
stone railing along the edge of the park terrace
historic red brick building with white stone trim and multiple windows
trees with orange and red autumn foliage surrounding the park

segments.scene_description: Leaving the theatre sidewalk, the character crosses the open cobblestone plaza toward a park area. The theatre building recedes into the background on the left while a gazebo and autumn trees become visible ahead, with a red brick building on the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: park gazebo interior with card game in progress

events.description: walking up stone steps and entering the wooden gazebo structure
slowing to approach the card table where two men are playing

agents.ego_description: ascending the stone steps into the gazebo and approaching the wooden table where two men are engaged in a card game

notable_agents.action: two men sitting at the table playing a game of All Fives with cards and dominoes

entered.detail: wooden octagonal gazebo with railings, support posts, and hanging lantern
simple wooden table with game pieces, cards, and dominoes spread on surface
stone steps leading up to the raised gazebo platform
wooden park bench inside the gazebo structure

segments.scene_description: The character enters the wooden gazebo, ascending stone steps to a wooden deck where two men are engaged in a card game at a table. The structure provides shelter while offering views of the surrounding park through its open railings, with warm light from the hanging lantern.

scene_state.functional_zone: gazebo interior with view of illuminated theatre district

events.description: turning to look out from the gazebo toward the theatre building across the plaza
viewing the fully illuminated Théâtre Râleur facade from the park perspective

agents.ego_description: standing at the card table and looking around the gazebo interior, viewing the illuminated theatre building across the plaza

notable_agents.action: card player arranging game pieces on the table

entered.detail: illuminated theatre front with Théâtre Râleur signage, bright bulbs, and grand entrance
wide stone staircase with railings leading up to the theatre entrance
wooden park benches along the cobblestone plaza edge

segments.scene_description: From inside the gazebo, the camera pans to reveal the Théâtre Râleur illuminated across the plaza, with its grand staircase and bright signage standing out against the night sky. The card game continues at the table as the character observes the atmospheric theatre district from the sheltered wooden deck.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the bustling, illuminated sidewalk of a theatre district into the quiet shelter of a park gazebo. It begins by gliding along wet cobblestones beside a grand theatre, passing under a bright marquee and vaudeville posters as a horse-drawn carriage rolls by. As the character leaves the sidewalk, the scene opens into a wide cobblestone plaza where the theatre recedes to the left and a gazebo nestled among autumn trees emerges ahead. The camera then ascends stone steps to enter the wooden gazebo, shifting from the open night air to a sheltered deck where two men play cards under the warm glow of a hanging lantern. Finally, the view pans away from the card game to reveal the brightly lit Théâtre Râleur and its grand staircase standing out against the dark sky across the plaza.
